positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric constellation of interconnecting celestial bodies, rendered in deep sapphire blue and glowing gold foil accents. The composition features an abstract central nexus point drawing the eye, surrounded by interlocking polygonal stars and orbiting semi-transparent planetary rings. The aesthetic is modern astro-surrealism, combining sacred geometry patterns (like mandalas or platonic solids) with cosmic elements. Clean silhouettes, strong contrast against a midnight black background, perfect for apparel printing. Highly detailed, vector-graphic quality, clean lines, high contrast, symmetrical composition.
